_note: CHARACTER_VOCABULARY_V2.md §5 Subset C, C1-C19 (Mind, Character, Skill). All render:false (chat-side; feeds Stage-6 persona injection / §9 RAG seed). Mem column provisional per flag 1 - the prompt fragments are best-effort natural-language descriptors, re-cut at 6d. Caps ('cap N') and single-select defaults are documented per group but NOT format-enforced (deferred at 5.6c - no format key yet). Replaces the pre-V2 disposition/traits/voice groups from 50_personality.json; 'traits' reuses its id (C7), disposition/voice retire to lint (keep+lint only).

groups.hint: Who they are at the core - the one-line personality read. Chat-side: shapes how they talk and act, never how they look.
groups.label: Personality Archetype
groups._note: 5.7 (user decision 2026-07-18, rename+add resolution): the personality axis the old class-like archetype never was. Quick-create; render:false - feeds Stage-6 persona injection like the rest of Subset C. Prompts are natural-language persona descriptors (Mem provisional, flag 1).

options.label: The Schemer
options.prompt: always three steps ahead, plans in secret

options.label: The Stoic
options.prompt: composed, feelings kept behind a wall

options.label: The Nurturer
options.prompt: warm, tends to everyone around them

options.label: The Rebel
options.prompt: defies rules and authority on principle

options.label: The Idealist
options.prompt: believes the world can be better and acts like it

options.label: The Loner
options.prompt: keeps distance, opens up to almost no one

options.label: The Wallflower
options.prompt: quiet observer, blooms only in trusted company

options.label: The Caretaker
options.prompt: duty-bound to look after their people

options.label: The Wanderer
options.prompt: restless, never settles, always moving on

options.label: The Optimist
options.prompt: finds the bright side, lifts the room

options.label: The Brooder
options.prompt: carries old weight, speaks in shadows

groups.label: Skills
groups._note: C18. Intended cap 6 (unenforced). MUST carry no visible_when - it is the referent of signature_skill's condition, which requires an always-visible referent (authoring note 2).

groups.label: Best at
groups._note: C19. The doc spec is 'a single choice drawn from the C18 selection'; the format has no options-from-another-group's-selection widget, so this is a full-list single picker duplicating C18's 72 options, conditioned to appear once 'skills' has any selection. NOT restricted to the exact chosen subset (format limitation). Option id set mirrors 'skills' exactly.
